message:
feat: ISO 27001 card — agent mode, live kubectl checks, unified controls (#3120)

* feat: add agent mode, live kubectl checks, and unified controls to ISO 27001 card

The ISO 27001 Security Audit card now runs real compliance checks against
connected clusters via kc-agent instead of only showing static demo data.
Adds cluster filter, search, sort, sort direction, and pagination controls.

- Add useCachedISO27001Audit hook with kubectl-based checks (RBAC, network
  policies, pod security, image security, secrets management, cluster config)
- Rewrite ISO27001Audit.tsx to use useCardDemoState, useCardData, and all
  unified card controls (CardClusterFilter, CardSearchInput, CardControls,
  Pagination)
- Remove iso27001_audit from DEMO_DATA_CARDS (now reports isDemoData via hook)
- Bump security dashboard storage key to v2 for layout migration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add storage key migration to inject ISO 27001 card into existing layouts

Adds ensureCardInDashboard() — a targeted migration that injects a missing
card into saved dashboard layouts without resetting the entire layout.
Applied at module-load in Security.tsx so existing users get the ISO 27001
card as the first card in the security dashboard.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
